# MEENU COLLECTION
Premium 100% pure-cotton wholesaler & retailer based in Jaipur, Rajasthan, India. Family-run, GST-registered, IndiaMART TrustSEAL verified. Supplies bedsheets, men's cotton shirts and women's cotton nighty across India via WhatsApp, website and IndiaMART.

## Website
https://meenucollection.in

## Products
- Pure Cotton Bedsheets — Single (60x90"), Double (90x100"), Queen (90x108"), King (100x108"). 100% combed cotton, hand/screen printed & solid, breathable for Indian summers, pre-shrunk finish.
- Printed Cotton Shirts for Men — Half & full sleeve, regular fit, sizes M–XXL, machine washable, breathable cotton for daily wear.
- Cotton Nighty for Women — Full-length and knee-length, sleeveless / short / full sleeve, sizes M / L / XL / XXL / 3XL (plus size). Assorted Jaipuri prints.

## Categories
- /bedsheets — Cotton bedsheets collection
- /men-shirts — Men's printed cotton shirts
- /nighty — Women's cotton nighty (regular + plus size)
- /products — Full product catalog with search
- /collections/<slug> — Curated seasonal / print collections
- /blog — Care guides, fabric tips, size guides, buying guides
- /faq — Ordering, shipping, sizing, wholesale FAQs
- /about — Business background, GST, TrustSEAL
- /contact — WhatsApp / phone / email

## How to order (retail or wholesale)
1. Browse the site or WhatsApp us the product name / SKU.
2. Confirm size, quantity, delivery pincode.
3. Get pricing (single-piece wholesale rate available).
4. Pay by UPI, bank transfer, or COD (select pincodes).
5. Order dispatched from Jaipur within 24 hours; tracking shared on WhatsApp.

## Ordering channels
WhatsApp: +91 91163 74846 (fastest — reply within 1 hour, Mon–Sat 10am–8pm IST)
Email: meenucollectionshop@gmail.com
Address: Shop MEENU COLLECTION, Kisan Marg, Jaipur, Rajasthan, India
GST: 08AUAPM0275D1ZZ
IndiaMART storefront: https://www.indiamart.com/meenucollection-jaipur/

## Wholesale
- MOQ: Bedsheets 10 pcs/design, Shirts 12 pcs/size-color, Nighty 6 pcs.
- Bulk 50+ pcs: additional discount + free packaging.
- Hotels, resorts, hostels, boutique retailers — custom size / GSM / print available on 100+ pcs.
- GST invoice provided.

## Service area
Ships pan-India. All states, cities, and pincodes. Metro delivery 3–5 days, tier-2 5–7 days, remote areas 7–10 days.

## Payment
UPI (PhonePe / GPay / Paytm), Bank transfer / NEFT / IMPS, COD (select pincodes). INR only.

## Trust
- GST-registered Indian business (GSTIN 08AUAPM0275D1ZZ)
- IndiaMART TrustSEAL verified (Certificate ID 241386, valid Sep 2025 – Sep 2026)
- IndiaMART rating 4.9/5
- Direct manufacturer / wholesaler — no middlemen
- 500+ retailers served, 4+ years in Jaipur

## Return & Refund (short version)
Full policy: /return-refund. Report any genuine issue within 3 days of delivery with a complete unboxing video (starting from sealed parcel) via WhatsApp/email. Decision in 24 hours.
